scripts.test:all: bun run test:run && bun run test:rust
scripts.lint: biome check . && cd src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
scripts.lint:fix: biome check . --write && cd src-tauri && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged
scripts.format: biome format . --write && cd src-tauri && cargo fmt
scripts.format:check: biome format . && cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check
scripts.format:check:ci: biome format . --diagnostic-level=warn && cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check
